name: Peach Fritters (Parshing Ponakucka)
recipeInstructions:
1. May use either fresh or canned peaches.
2. Cream the butter and sugar together until well blended. Add the eggs and beat thoroughly.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) and gradually add them to the mixture of butter, sugar, and eggs with alternating additions of milk.
4. Fold in the chopped peaches, lemon juice, and vanilla extract until evenly distributed.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot fat and fry until golden brown on each side.
6. Serve immediately with whipped cream or sprinkle with powdered sugar.
